nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: GANODERMA LUCIDUM MYCELIUM/PANAX GINSENG ROOT FERMENT EXTRACT FILTRATE
chemicalDescription: Ganoderma Lucidum Mycelium/Panax Ginseng Root Ferment Extract Filtrate is a filtrate of the extract of the product obtained by the fermentation of the roots of Panax ginseng by the fungus, Ganoderma lucidum, Polyporaceae.
inciName: GANODERMA LUCIDUM MYCELIUM/PANAX GINSENG ROOT FERMENT EXTRACT FILTRATE

chemicalDescription: sh-pentapeptide-1 is the synthetic peptide containing arginine, aspartic acid, lysine, tyrosine and valine residues
"Geranium Oil; Rose Geranium Oil". Pelargonium Roseum Leaf Oil is an essential oil obtained from the leaves of the plant, Pelargonium roseum, Geraniaceae

rh-Polypeptide-22 is a single chain recombinant human peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is directly isolated from a human cell which codes for Transforming Growth Factor Beta 1. It contains a maximum of 390 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids
Pinane, didehydro derivative
Thuja Plicata Leaf Oil is an essential oil obtained from the leaves of the Thuja, Thuja plicata, Cupressaceae
Lobelia Inflata is the herb obtained from the whole plant, Lobelia inflata L., Campanulaceae
Coelastrella Vacuolata Oil is the oil obtained from the alga, Coelastrella vacuolata grown in culture, Scenedesmaceae.
Mentha Spicata Leaf Extract is the extract of the leaves of Mentha spicata, Lamiaceae.
Nannochloropsis Oceanica Extract is the extract of the alga, Nannochloropsis oceanica.
Hydrolyzed Brassica Napus Seedcake Extract is the hydrolysate of the extract of the seedcake dervied from  Brassica napus  dervied by acid, enzyme or other method of hydrolysis, Brassicaceae.
Acacia Farnesiana Flower Wax is a wax obtained from the flowers of Acacia farnesiana, Fabaceae.
Hibiscus Sabdariffa Leaf Extract is the extract of the leaves of  Hibiscus sabdariffa, Malvaceae.
Tripeptide-60 is the synthetic peptide consisting of leucine, arginine and phenylalanine.

Nicotiana Benthamiana Hexapeptide-40 sh-Polypeptide-2 is a fusion peptide of Hexapeptide-40 with a single chain recombinant human peptide, produced by  Nicotiana benthamiana  after using either a transient expression system or transgenesis (stable insertion of a copy of a human gene into its DNA). The starting human gene is synthesized to be identical to the human gene which codes for Thioredoxin and contains a maximum of 105 amino acids. The fusion peptide contains 110 amino acids, which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: HORSE ADIPOSE STROMAL CELL CONDITIONED MEDIA
chemicalDescription: Horse Adipose Stromal Cell Conditioned Media is the growth media removed from cultures of stromal cells from the adipose tissue isolated from horses after several days of growth. The starting media is either Dulbecco's Modified Eagle Medium which may or may not contain fetal bovine serum, or a serum-free nutrient media.
inciName: HORSE ADIPOSE STROMAL CELL CONDITIONED MEDIA

chemicalDescription: Polyglyceryl-3 Dicitrate/Stearate is the diester of Polyglycerin-3 with a mixture of Citric Acid and Stearic Acid.
Musa Basjoo Extract is the extract of the whole plant, Musa basjoo, Musaceae.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: LYCIUM CHINENSE FRUIT/SAFFLOWER FLOWER/ROOT/PORIA COCOS EXTRACT
chemicalDescription: This is the extract of: the fruits of  Lycium chinense  , Carthamus Tinctorius (Safflower) Flower, the roots of  Gastrodia elata, Paeonia suffruticosa , Panax notoginseng, Salvia miltiorrhiza, Scutellaria baicalensis, Glycyrrhiza Glabra (Licorice) Root, Panax Ginseng Root, and Poria Cocos Extract.
inciName: LYCIUM CHINENSE FRUIT/SAFFLOWER FLOWER/ROOT/PORIA COCOS EXTRACT

chemicalDescription: Codium Fragile/Enteromorpha Compressa Leaf Extract is the extract of the alga,  Codium fragile , and the leaves of  Enteromorpha compressa.
Cestrum Nocturnum Branch/Flower/Leaf Water is the aqueous solution of the steam distillates obtained from the branches, flowers and leaves of  Cestrum nocturnum.

Polyurethane-74 is a copolymer formed by reacting Isophorone Diisocyanate (q.v.) with neopenyl glycol mono(hydroxypivalate) and a polyester pre-polymer that is made by condensing diethyl carbonate, Hexanediol, Glycol, and epsilon-caprolactone. The polymer is capped with 2-hydroxyethyl acrylate.

sh-Oligopeptide-82 is a single chain synthetic human peptide, produced by fermentation in  E. coli  and contains 68 amino acids. The starting gene is a synthesized copy of the human gene which codes for Stromal Cell-Derived Factor 1 used as such or adapted to the production host. Stromal Cell-Derived Factor 1 codes for a maximum of 93 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Glycereth-3 Caprylate/Caprate is the ester of a mixture of Caprylic Acid and Capric Acid with a polyethylene glycol ether of glycerin containing an average of 3 moles of ethylene oxide.
Lactobacillus/Chondrus Ocellatus Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of the alga,  Chondrus ocellatus  by the microorganism,  Lactobacillus.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: SR-PECTOBACTERIUM POLYPEPTIDE-1 ARGINYL SR-SPIDER OLIGOPEPTIDE-1 DIPEPTIDE-19 HEXAPEPTIDE-40
chemicalDescription: sr-Pectobacterium Polypeptide-1 Arginyl sr-Spider Oligopeptide-1 Dipeptide-19 Hexapeptide-40 is a single chain recombinant fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in  E. coli.  The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from sr-Pectobacterium Polypeptide-1, sr-Spider Oligopeptide-1, Dipeptide-19,  and Hexapeptide-40 with the initiation code for Arginine (q.v.). The fusion peptide contains 79 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
inciName: SR-PECTOBACTERIUM POLYPEPTIDE-1 ARGINYL SR-SPIDER OLIGOPEPTIDE-1 DIPEPTIDE-19 HEXAPEPTIDE-40

chemicalDescription: Ammonium Acrylates/Vinyl Imidazole Copolymer is the ammonium salt of a copolymer of vinyl imidzole and one or more monomers of acrylic acid, methacrylic acid or one of their simple esters.
Bis-HEMA PPG-26/IPDI Copolymer is a copolymer of PPG-26 and Isophorone Diisocyanate (IPDI) end-capped with HEMA.

Polypropanediol-5/Polyglycerin-3 Copolymer Sesquistearate is a polymer made by condensing Polypropanediol-4 containing an average of five moles of propanediol with Polyglycerin-3 to form a block copolymer. The block copolymer is subsequently esterified with Stearic Acid  to produce a mixture of mono- and diesters.
Dendrobium Moniliforme Callus Culture Extract is the extract of a culture of the callus of Dendrobium moniliforme, Orchidaceae
Hydrolyzed Torulaspora Delbruekii Extract is the hydrolysate of an extract of Torulaspora delbruekii derived by acid, enzyme or other method of hydrolysis, Sacharomycetaceae.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: PUNICA GRANATUM SEED OIL HYDROXYPHENETHYL ESTERS
chemicalDescription: Punica Granatum Seed Oil Hydroxyphenethyl Esters is the complex mixture of esters formed by the transesterification of hydroxyethyl phenol with Punica Granatum Seed Oil
inciName: PUNICA GRANATUM SEED OIL HYDROXYPHENETHYL ESTERS

chemicalDescription: Secale Cereale Phytoplacenta Extract is the extract of the phytoplacenta of Secale cereale, Poaceae
Vaccinium Myrtillus Leaf Cell Extract is the extract of a culture of the leaf cells of Vaccinium myrtillus, Ericaceae.
Caffeoyl Tetrapeptide-19 Caffeamide is the derivative of Tetrapeptide-19 in which the N-terminus and the lysine residue are modified by Caffeic Acid.
Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Flower Wax is a wax obtained from the flower of Lavandula angustifolia, Lamiaceae.
CI 59040 is classed chemically as a pyrene colour. It conforms to the formula:
cosmeticRestriction:
IV/87 (CI 59040)
II/1362 (Solvent Green 7; CI 59040: when used as a substance in hair dye products)

chemicalDescription: Dictyopteris Polypodioides Extract is the extract of the alga,  Dictyopteris polypodioides, Dictyotaceae.

sh-Hexapeptide-3 is a single chain human peptide, produced synthetically to be identical to a portion of the protein, Sulfotransferase Family Cytosolic 2B Member 1, and contains 6 amino acids consisting of glycine, lysine, serine, threonine, and tryptophan.
Oligopeptide-141 Hexapeptide-8 is the synthetic peptide containing 18 amino acids consisting of Oligopeptide-141 and Hexapeptide-8.
Sapindus Emarginatus Fruit/Sucrose Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the spontaneous fermentation of the fruit of Sapindus emarginatus and sucrose.
"Peru Balsam". Myroxylon Balsamum Pereirae Balsam Extract is an extract of the balsam obtained from the Balsam Peru Tree, Myroxylon balsamum (L.) var. pereirae, Leguminosae
Pinus Pinaster Twig Leaf Oil is an essential oil obtained from the twigs leaves of the Maritime Pine, Pinus pinaster, Pinaceae
PEG-12 Dimethicone/PPG-20 Crosspolymer is a crosslinked polymer of Hydrogen Dimethicone crosslinked with Bis-allyl PPG-20.
Palmitoyl Decapeptide-21 is the product obtained by the reaction of palmitic acid and Decapeptide-21.
Balanites Aegyptiaca Seed Extract is the extract of the seeds of Balanites aegyptiaca, Zygophyllaceae
Pentapeptide-30 Cysteinamide is the product obtained by the reaction of Pentapeptide-30 and Cysteine.
Oxalis Triangularis Oil is the volatile oil derived from the whole plant, Oxalis triangularis.
Rhodiola Sachalinensis Callus Culture Extract is the extract of a culture of the callus of Rhodiola sachalinensis, Crassulaceae
Saccharomyces/Hydrolyzed Rice Bran Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermention of Hydrolyzed Rice Bran by the microorganism, Saccharomyces.
Carya Ovata Bark Extract is the extract of the bark of Carya ovata

chemicalName: Jasmine Flower Wax,Jasmine Wax,Jasminum Officinale Wax
chemicalDescription: Jasminum Officinale (Jasmine) Flower Wax is a wax obtained from the flower of Jasminum officinale, Oleaceae.
Ludwigia Octovalvis Extract is the extract of the whole plant,  Ludwigia octovalvis,  Onagraceae.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: DAUCUS CAROTA SATIVA ROOT CELL CULTURE LYSATE
chemicalDescription: Daucus Carota Sativa Root Cell Culture Lysate is a lysate of a suspension of the cultured root cells of  Daucus carota sativa, Apiaceae.
inciName: DAUCUS CAROTA SATIVA ROOT CELL CULTURE LYSATE

chemicalDescription: Coriandrum Sativum (Coriander) Oil is the volatile oil obtained from the whole plant,  Coriandrum sativum, Apiaceae.
Lactobacillus/Milt Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of fish milt by the microorganism,  Lactobacillus.
Mayamaea Permitis Extract is the extract of the alga,  Mayamaea permitis, Naviculales incertaesedis.
Oligopeptide-141 Hexapeptide-8 Heptapeptide-32 is the synthetic peptide containing 25 amino acids consisting of Oligopeptide-141, Hexapeptide-8 and Heptapeptide-32 .
Oligopeptide-141 is the synthetic peptide containing 12 amino acids consisting of alanine, asparagine, glycine, histidine, isoleucine, leucine, proline, serine, and threonine.
Isostearoyl Hydrolyzed Keratin is the condensation product of isostearic acid chloride with Hydrolyzed Keratin.
Tetrapeptide-51 is the synthetic peptide consisting of alanine, glycine and serine.

Lauryl Methacrylate/Methacryloyloxypropyl Dimethicone Copolymer is a polymer that is made by first preparing a pre-polymer composed of methacryloyloxypropylmethyl diethoxysilane that has been hydrolyzed and condensed with Dimethiconol. The silicone pre-polymer is then polymerized with Lauryl Methacrylate
Nonoxynol/Nonyl Nonoxynol-49 is the reaction product of a mixture of branched-chain nonyl and dinonyl phenol with an average of 49 moles of ethylene oxide.
Bis-Ethylhexyl Poly(1,4-Butanediol)-13/IPDI Copolymer is a copolymer of poly(1,4-butanediol)-13 and Isophorone Diisocyanate (IPDI) end-capped with 2-ethylhexanol.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: BACILLUS/MORUS ALBA LEAF/SOYBEAN SEED FERMENT FILTRATE
chemicalDescription: Bacillus/Morus Alba Leaf/Soybean Seed Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of the seeds of  Glycine max  (soybean) and the leaves of  Morus alba  by the microorganism,  Bacillus.
inciName: BACILLUS/MORUS ALBA LEAF/SOYBEAN SEED FERMENT FILTRATE

chemicalDescription: sh-Oligopeptide-73 Amide Acetate is the acetate salt of a protein produced synthetically to be identical to the human protein, Substance P. It contains 11 amino acids in which the C-terminus is an amide, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Oligopeptide-137 is a synthetic peptide containing 12 amino acids consisting of alanine, glutamic acid, glycine, leucine, phenylalanine, serine and threonine.
Oligopeptide-138 is a synthetic peptide containing 11 amino acids consisting of alanine, glutamine, isoleucine, leucine, lysine, phenylalanine, tyrosine and valine

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: CAMELLIA SINENSIS CALLUS CULTURE CONDITIONED MEDIA
chemicalDescription: Camellia Sinensis Callus Culture Conditioned Media is the growth media removed from cultures of the callus of Camellia sinensis after several days of growth
inciName: CAMELLIA SINENSIS CALLUS CULTURE CONDITIONED MEDIA

chemicalDescription: Citrus Tachibana/Reticulata Fruit Juice is the juice expressed from the fruit of a hybrid of Citrus tachbana and Citrus reticulata.
4-Isobutylresorcinol is the organic compound
Oleoyl Pine Bark Extract is the product obtained by the reaction of oleoyl chloride and Pinus Pinaster Bark Extract
Pentapeptide-29 Cysteinamide is the product obtained by the reaction of Pentapeptide-29 and Cysteine.
Raponticin Glucoside is the organic compound
Cosmos Bipinnatus Callus Culture Extract is the extract of a culture of the callus of Cosmos binnatus, Asteraceae
Cocoyl Pentapeptide-9 is the product obtained by the reaction of Coconut Acid and Pentapeptide-9.
Paraffin is a solid mixture of hydrocarbons obtained from petroleum characterized by relatively large crystals.
Moringa Oleifera Seed Extract is the extract of the seeds of Moringa oleifera, Moringaceae.
Lycium Chinense Leaf Powder is the powder obtained from the dried, ground leaves of the Chinese Lycium Chinense, Solanaceae
Aminolevulinoyl Tripeptide-7 is the product obtained by the reaction of aminolevulinoyl chloride with Tripeptide-7.
Aminolevulinoyl Pentapeptide-6 is the product obtained by the reaction of aminolevulinoyl chloride and Pentapeptide-6
Aspergillus/Potato Starch/Wheat Flour Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of wheat flour and potato starch by the microorganism,  Aspergillus.
Lanolin Wax is the semisolid fraction of lanolin obtained by physical means from whole lanolin
Montan Wax is a wax obtained by extraction of lignite
Polyglyceryl-3 Cetyl Ether Olivate/Succinate is the monoester of Polyglyceryl-3 Cetyl Ether (q.v.) with a mixture of Olive Acid (q.v.) and Succinic Acid (q.v.).
SD Alcohol 27-B is ethyl alcohol denatured with lavender oil and medicinal soft soap (green soap) in accordance with 27CFR21.
Magnolia Obovata Fruit Extract is the extract of the fruit of  Magnolia obovata, Magnoliaceae.

SD Alcohol 39-A is ethyl alcohol denatured with t-butyl alcohol and one of the following: quinine, quinine bisulfate, quinine dihydrochloride, cinchonidine, or cinchonidine sulfate or their salts in accordance with 27CFR21.

chemicalName: Alcohol Denat.,Denatured Alcohol, Not Designated by the Government
chemicalDescription: SD Alcohol 39-C is ethyl alcohol denatured with diethyl phthalate in accordance with 27CFR21
SD Alcohol 39-D is ethyl alcohol denatured with bay oil (myrica oil) and either quinine sulfate, or sodium salicylate in accordance with 27CFR21
SD Alcohol 46 is ethyl alcohol denatured with phenol and methyl salicylate in accordance with 27CFR21

r-Clostridium Histolyticum Collagenase H is a single chain recombinant  Clostridium histolyticum  protein, with one mutation, produced by fermentation in  E. coli.  The starting gene is directly isolated from  Clostridium histolyticum  which codes for the enzyme collagenase.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: LILIUM CANDIDUM BULB/CYMBIDIUM GRANDIFLORUM FLOWER/MALVA SYLVESTRIS EXTRACT
chemicalDescription: Lilium Candidum Bulb/Cymbidium Grandiflorum Flower/Malva Sylvestris Extract is the extract of the bulbs of  Lilium candidum  , the flowers of  Cymbidium grandiflorum  , and the whole plant,  Malva sylvestris.
inciName: LILIUM CANDIDUM BULB/CYMBIDIUM GRANDIFLORUM FLOWER/MALVA SYLVESTRIS EXTRACT

chemicalDescription: Silene Colorata Extract is the extract of the whole plant, Silene colorata, Caryophyllaceae.
is a complex siloxane polymer that is formed by the reaction between glycidoxy-terminated polydimethylsiloxane, N,N,N',N'-tetramethyl-1,6-hexanediamine, PPG-3 and Lauric Acid.
Salix Alba (Willow) Bark Powder is the powder obtained from the dried, ground bark of Salix alba.
Pollia Condensata Fruit Extract is the extract of the fruit of Pollia condensata, Commelinaceae.

Tripeptide-49 Oligopeptide-91 Dipeptide-19 sh-Polypeptide-1 is a single chain synthetic fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from sh-Polypeptide-1, Tripeptide-49, Oligopeptide-91, and Dipeptide-19. The fused peptide contains 314 amino acids and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Soluble Fibroin a water soluble nonhydrolyzed, native protein derived from Fibroin.
Chondracanthus Tenellus/Saccharina Angustata/Ulva Linza Extract is the extract of the algae, Chondracanthus tenellus , Saccharina angustata , and Ulva linza.
Kunzea Pomifera Seed Oil is the volatile oil derived from the seeds of  Kunzea pomifera, Myrtaceae.
Human T Cell Conditioned Media is the growth media removed from cultures of human T cells after several days of growth. The starting media is a serum-free nutrient medium.
Cytisus Scoparius Flower Wax is the wax obtained from the flowers of  Cytisus scoparius, Fabaceae.
Schizophylum Commune (Mushroom) Extract is the extract of the fungus, Schizophyllum commune, Schizophyllaceae.

Methionyl Hexapeptide-40 sh-Decapeptide-1 Tripeptide-44 rh-Polypeptide-3 is a single chain recombinant fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in  E. coli.  The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from Hexapeptide-40, sh-Decapeptide-1, Tripeptide-44 and rh-Polypeptide-3  with the initiation code for methionine. The fusion peptide contains 183 amino acids and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Cinnamomum Camphora (Camphor) Adventitious Root Extract is the extract of the adventitious roots of Cinnamomum camphora grown in culture, Lauraceae.
Bis-HEMA IPDI/PPG-12 Copolymer is a copolymer of PPG-12 and isophorone diisocyanate (IPDI) end-capped with hydroxyethyl methacrylate (HEMA).
Piscum Iecur Oil is the fixed oil expressed from the fresh livers of mixed fish. It consists primarily of the glycerides of unsaturated C14-18 and unsaturated C16-22 fatty acids.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: ASCOPHYLLUM NODOSUM/FUCUS VESICULOSUS/HIZIKIA FUSIFORME/KJELLMANIELLA GYRATA/LESSONIA NIGRESCENS/SACCHARINA ANGUSTATA/SACCHARINA JAPONICA/UNDARIA PINNATIFIDA EXTRACT

inciName: SACCHAROMYCES/PANAX GINSENG SPROUT FERMENT EXTRACT FILTRATE

chemicalDescription: Piper Malacophyllum Flower/Leaf/Stem Oil is the volatile oil obtained from the flowers, leaves and stems of  Piper malacophyllum.

SD Alcohol 38-F is ethyl alcohol denatured with 1) thymol, chlorathymol, menthol, and either boric acid or polysorbate-80; 2) any two or more denaturants listed under Formula 38-B, and either boric acid or polysorbate-80; 3) any two or more denaturants listed under Formula 38-B, and zinc chloride and hydrochloric acid in accordance with 27CFR21
SD Alcohol 40-A is ethyl alcohol denatured with t-butyl alcohol and sucrose octaacetate in accordance with 27CFR21
Shellac Wax is a waxy fraction of bleached shellac obtained by physical means.
Silk Powder is finely pulverized silk.

Diisopropanolamine/Methylhexahydrophthalic Anhydride Nonanoate Copolymer is a branched polymer formed by reacting Diisopropanolamine  with methylhexahydrophthalic anhydride, and capping with nonanoic acid.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: HUMAN TOOTH PULP STEM CELL CONDITIONED MEDIA
chemicalDescription: Human Tooth Pulp Stem Cell Conditioned Media is the growth media removed from cultures of human tooth pulp stem cells after several days of growth. The starting media is Dulbecco's Modified Eagle Medium, and may or may not contain fetal bovine serum.
inciName: HUMAN TOOTH PULP STEM CELL CONDITIONED MEDIA

chemicalDescription: Prunus Campanulata/Yedoensis Leaf Extract is the extract of the leaves of the hybrid formed between  Prunus yedoensis  and  Prunus campanulata.
Lactobacillus/Tomato Fruit Ferment Extract is the extract of the product obtained by the fermentation of the fruit of Solanum lycopersicum (tomato) by the microorganism, Lactobacillus.
Salvia Triloba Leaf Oil is the volatile oil obtained from the leaves of Salvia triloba, Lamiaceae.
Santalum Paniculatum Wood Oil is the volatile oil obtained from the wood of Santalum paniculatum, Apiaceae.

Pumpkin Seed Oil Polyglyceryl-4 Esters is the complex mixture of esters formed by the transesterification of Cucurbita Pepo (Pumpkin) Seed Oil and Polyglycerin-4
Oxidized Microcrystalline Wax is the reaction product of Microcrystalline Wax and oxygen.
Potassium Oxidized Microcrystalline Wax is the potassium salt of Oxidized Microcrystalline Wax
Aniba Rosodora Wood Extract is the extract of the wood of  Aniba rosodora, Lauraceae.

chemicalDescription: Lilium Candidum Callus Culture Extract is the extract of a culture of the callus of  Lilium candidum, Liliaceae.
Nopalea Cochenillifera Fruit Extract is the extract of the fruit of  Nopalea cochenillifera, Cactaceae.

Oligopeptide-126 sh-Oligopeptide-1 is a single chain synthetic fusion peptide produced by fermentation in  e.Coli.  The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from sh-Oligopeptide-1 and Oligopeptide-126 . The fusion peptide contains 69 amino acids and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Aleurites Moluccanus Extract is the extract of the whole plant, Aleurites moluccanus, Euphorbiaceae
Vitis Flexuosa Stem Extract is the extract of the stems of Vitis flexuosa, Vitaceae.

Methionyl sh-Oligopeptide-75 sh-Oligopeptide-2 is a single chain synthetic fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from sh-Oligopeptide-75 and sh-Oligopeptide-2 with the code for methionine. The fused peptide contains 85 amino acids and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Glucomannan Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride is the quaternary ammonium salt formed by the reaction of glycidyltrimethylammonium chloride and Glucomannan
Gymnanthemum Amygdalinum Leaf Extract is the extract of the leaves of  Gymnanthemum amygdalinum, Asteraceae.
SD Alcohol 30 is ethyl alcohol denatured with methyl alcohol in accordance with 27CFR21
SD Alcohol 37 is ethyl alcohol denatured with eucalyptol, thymol and menthol in accordance with 27CFR21

chemicalName: Brevoortia Oil (EU),Brevoortia Tyrannus Oil,Menhaden Fish Oil,Mossbunker Oil
chemicalDescription: Menhaden Oil is the oil obtained from the small North Atlantic fish, Brevoortia tyrannus.

chemicalName: Cera Microcristallina (EU),Hydrocarbon Waxes, Microcryst,Petroleum Wax, Microcrystalline
chemicalDescription: Microcrystalline Wax is a wax derived from petroleum and characterized by the fineness of its crystals in contrast to the larger crystals of paraffin wax. It consists of high molecular weight saturated aliphatic hydrocarbons.

Polyacrylate Crosspolymer-14 is a copolymer of acrylic acid, lauryl methacrylate, cetyl methacrylate, stearyl methacrylate, and phosphorylcholine glycol methacrylate, crosslinked by an allyl ether of pentaerythritol
Hydrolyzed Drosera Rotundifolia Leaf is the hydrolysate of the leaves of  Drosera rotundifolia  derived by acid, enzyme or other method of hydrolysis, Droseraceae.
Bis-Methoxy PEG-10 Poly(Tetramethylxylene Diisocyanate) is a polymer of tetramethylxylene diisocyanate, end-capped with methoxy PEG-10.
SD Alcohol 36 is ethyl alcohol denatured with ammonium hydroxide and sodium hydroxide in accordance with 27CFR21.

Acrylates/Methacryloyl Propyltrimethoxysilane Crosspolymer is a polymer of Methacryloyl Propyltrimethoxysilane with acrylic acid, methacrylic acid or one of its simple esters, crosslinked with 1,4-butanediol dimethacrylate.
